brand.name: Bella Brutta
brand.description: Your neighbourhood pizza spot in the heart of Newtown. Good pizza, great company — come as you are.

hero.headline: Good Pizza. Great Company.
hero.subhead: Dine in or takeaway, seven days a week. We're on King Street and just around the corner on Missenden Road — Newtown's local pizza spot, open 'til late.

items.title: Open 7 Days
items.body: Dine-in from 5:30 PM Monday to Thursday and from 5 PM Friday to Sunday. Weekend lunch kicks off from 12 PM — because good pizza shouldn't wait 'til dinner.

items.title: Dine In or Takeaway
items.body: Settle into King Street for the full sit-down experience, or swing by our Missenden Road shopfront and grab it to go. Either way, the pizza's the same.

items.title: Banquet Done Right
items.body: Got a group? Let us feed the table. Our banquet at $65 per person takes the hassle out of ordering and puts the fun back in.

sections.title: What We Do
sections.body: We keep it honest — proper pizza, à la carte or banquet-style, with no fuss and no pretence. Check our full menu or jump straight to ordering takeaway online.

items.title: À La Carte
items.body: Order what you want, when you want it. Our à la carte menu has you covered for a casual Tuesday or a big Friday night.

items.title: Banquet — $65pp
items.body: Sit back and let us bring the food. Perfect for groups who'd rather talk than deliberate over the menu all night.

items.title: Weekend Lunch
items.body: We're open from 12 PM on Saturdays and Sundays. Come in for a long lunch — worn timber tables, good pizza, nowhere to be.

sections.title: A Newtown Original
sections.body: Bella Brutta has been feeding Newtown for years from our spot on King Street. We're not chasing trends or reinventing the wheel — we just make really good pizza and look after our people. You'll find us most nights buzzing with regulars, first-timers, families, and friends. Come as you are.

items.title: Dine-In
items.body: King Street, Newtown. Book ahead or walk in and try your luck.

items.title: Takeaway
items.body: 170–172 Missenden Road, Newtown. Open from 5 PM on weekdays and from 12 PM on weekends.

items.title: Group Bookings
items.body: Planning a big night? We love a full table. Get in touch and we'll sort it out.

items.title: Gift Cards
items.body: Give the gift of good pizza. Bella Brutta gift cards are a solid call for any occasion.

items.title: Merch
items.body: Take a little bit of Bella Brutta home. Our merch makes for a proper Newtown souvenir.

items.title: A Newtown Institution
items.body: "The pizza is everything. We've been coming here for years and it never lets us down. Neighbourhood vibes, every time."

items.title: Best Takeaway in the Area
items.body: "Missenden Road is our Friday night sorted. Quick, delicious, no drama."

items.title: Banquet is the Move
items.body: "Brought a big group for the banquet and it was an absolute winner. Nobody went home hungry."

sections.title: Find Us
sections.body: Two locations in Newtown — King Street for dine-in, Missenden Road for takeaway. We're open seven days, 'til late.

contact.address: Dine-in: 135 King Street, Newtown NSW 2042 | Takeaway: 170–172 Missenden Road, Newtown
contact.hours: Dine-in: Mon–Thu 5:30 PM 'til late, Fri–Sun 5 PM 'til late. Lunch: Sat & Sun 12 PM–4:30 PM. Takeaway: Mon–Fri from 5 PM, Sat & Sun from 12 PM.

footer.blurb: Bella Brutta — your neighbourhood pizza spot in Newtown. Dine in on King Street or grab takeaway on Missenden Road. Open 7 days, 'til late.
